opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is in knots, the pain is coming in intense waves, and I'm passing nothing but water. I feel like my bowel is completely blocked and going to rupture.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramps started a few hours ago after a big rich meal and they're really bad — I'm terrified something has burst or is blocked inside.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 4 hours ago, coming on after a heavy, rich meal
symptom_narrative.character: severe, gripping, colicky cramps low down that come in waves, and then I pass explosive watery stool — it's just water, no blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really intense during the spasms, the worst cramping I've had, and it's frightening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low down across the whole lower belly, not stuck in one spot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes in waves — a bad cramp, then I rush to the toilet, then a bit of relief, then it builds again
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting on the toilet and passing the watery stool gives a little relief for a moment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the cramps just build up on their own in waves
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no vomiting and I don't feel sick, no fevers, no blood in the toilet — just the cramps and watery diarrhoea
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get mild watery diarrhoea on and off normally and it usually doesn't bother me much, but it's never gripped me like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't settle — I keep pacing and rushing to the toilet, I can't do anything else right now

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing minor bowel condition — I had a camera test (colonoscopy) a while ago that looked normal but the biopsies showed some inflammation cells; they told me it isn't serious and doesn't damage the bowel
past_medical_history.how_managed: no regular treatment, I just live with the occasional loose stools

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently, felt well until the meal today, no recent travel or unusual food mentioned beyond a heavy rich meal

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: my watch says my pulse is around 90
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, taken while distressed and moving

objective_data_offered.value: looks restless and uncomfortable, grimacing and shifting during the cramping waves, but alert and talking in full sentences
